allow: PowerShell($configDir = "$env:APPDATA\\pixel-mcp"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $configDir | Out-Null; $config = @{ aseprite_path = "D:\\downloads\\Aseprite.v1.3.7\\Aseprite.exe"; temp_dir = ""; timeout = 30; log_level = "info"; log_file = ""; enable_timing = $false } | ConvertTo-Json; Set-Content -Path "$configDir\\config.json" -Value $config -Encoding utf8; Write-Host "Config written to: $configDir\\config.json"; Get-Content "$configDir\\config.json")
